text.text: Sve pohvale za kliniku.

text.text: Vjerovatno vrlo dobra klinika koja bi trebala da pazi na svoj renome kod izbora saradnika. Dr Stilet je neprijatan, nepristojan, i precenjuje svoje usluge. Za rutinsko uslugu zahtjevao je naknadu koja je skoro 500% veca nego sto je ta ista usluga naplacena kod ljubazne i profesionalne dermatologinje u Kotoru.

text.text: приехали в Черногорию с двумя маленькими детьми и они отравились. Хозяйка нашей виллы посоветовала нам доктора Jovan Raicevic. Очень внимательный и чуткий доктор, с прекрасным английским. Всегда был на связи. Девушки на ресепшене так же хорошо говорят на английском и очень отзывчивые. 1000 спасибо. Давина и Жозефин.

text.text: If you're looking for a clinic in Tivat where professional excellence meets genuine warmth, you're in the right place. This top-rated medical center is known not only for its expertise but also for its friendly, welcoming atmosphere—where every visit begins with a smile. Big recommendation for dr. Raicevic.

text.text: Upravo sam imala vrlo neprijatno iskustvo na pozivu sa doktorom Stiletom. Tolika kolicina ego-tripa, arogancije i prije svega NEKULTURE u jednom doktoru je zbilja zabrinjavajuca. Uzgajivac paprika u Zeti je plemenitiji i veci gospodin od doktora Nesoja. Sram vas bilo! Uzasnuta sam nekulturom. Ne preporucujem ovog dermatologa, sigurno je i nula strucnjak sa ovakvim ponasanjem. Stidite se.

text.text:
Razbolevsi se na letovanju, supruga i ja smo imali veliku srecu da smo se obratili za pomoc klinici Mansa Medica u Tivtu. Dugujemo veliku zahvalnost na izuzetnoj brizi, izuzetnoj strucnosti, posvecenosti pacijentima i ljudskoj toplini doktorki Nataliji Petranovic. Zahvaljuci njoj, ovo nase "bolesnicko" letovanje nam je ostalo u prijatnoj uspomeni. Dugujemo takodje zahvalnost i osoblju Klinike na velikoj ljubaznosti, efikasnosti, razumevanju i nesebicnoj podrsci.
Jos jednom, veliko hvala.
Porodica Adzic

text.text:
Сјајна клиника!
Особље је изузетно љубазно и ефикасно и има жељу да помогне и изађе у сусрет.
Др Матијевић је врхунски стручњак, апсолутни професионалац а уз то и изузетно смирен, љубазан и топао човек.
Такође, све препоруке и за Др Наталију.
Клиника за 10-ку!

text.text: Had to call into Mansa Medica Tivat when our young child wasn't feeling well on holiday in Montenegro. Scheduled the appointment direct with the doctor on the phone without giving any details - but was still seen. The receptionists aren't so good with English, which isn't an issue - doctor spoke fine enough English though and we were able to get a prescription for our child's illness. You do have to pay (not on GHIC or insurance), but that's fair enough IMO.

originalText.text: Had to call into Mansa Medica Tivat when our young child wasn't feeling well on holiday in Montenegro. Scheduled the appointment direct with the doctor on the phone without giving any details - but was still seen. The receptionists aren't so good with English, which isn't an issue - doctor spoke fine enough English though and we were able to get a prescription for our child's illness. You do have to pay (not on GHIC or insurance), but that's fair enough IMO.

text.text: Был сегодня 20.05.2022 с больным ребенком и сам больной в данной клинике. Такого подхода к пациентам от врачей, даже детских, я в России не встречал. Записаться на прием можно на английском языке. Ресепшен довольно таки неплохо говорит на английском, наверно даже лучше чем я. Врач Петар, который нас принимал довольно подробного распрашивал на что жалуемся. Сперва распросил и осмотрел меня, потом моего ребенка. Прекрасно говорит по английски, понимает по русски и даже кое-что может по русски спросить/ответить. Сказал, что ребенку требуется сдать два анализа, сдали тут же, результат через 15 минут. Стоимость за двоих 59 евро вышла вместе с анализами. Крайне рекомендую тем кто оказался в ситуации, что сильно заболели и не знаете куда обратиться в чужой для вас стране без страховки, как я.

text.text:
On my arrival to the clinic, which looks nice from the outside, but eventually horrible when I entered the reception to make an appointment with a doctor. Two very rude ladies, not even able to speak English but only few words. None of them wanted to help me and rudely told me; "call the doctor by phone"

Well normally I don't have any issues calling the doctor to make an appointment, but how unfortunate is it as a foreigner not having a local phone number? So I was not able to call the doctor for an urgent appointment.

I've never before experienced you as a patient can't make a doctors appointment with the reception. So, when the clinic snooze, they loose not having me as a patient.

I cannot recommend this clinic to anyone, especially not to foreigners! However, I can recommend the clinic to step up their game a lot more if they want to have foreign patients. Maybe the clinic is only meant to be for local people, but then correct it on your website and don't advertise you speak English, when you don't. Waste of ones time to get there.

Therefore the clinic only get's one star, in my opinion, they should have none.

text.text:
Behandlung erfolgte durch Dr. Stilet. Für ca.10 min. Smalltalk wurden EUR 50 Honorar in Anspruch genommen. Eine Quittung gab es auf Nachfrage.
Die verschriebene Salben und Tinkturen waren nicht wirksam.
Bei einer Ärztin in Podgorica habe ich dann doch noch Hilfe bekommen.

text.text: Reception speaks only Chernogorian. Pediatrician is very nice and speaks English. They don't accept insurance and you have to pay for the visit but the price is ok if you need to get medical assistance urgently.
